title: The door and whatever lies within
display_title: The door and whatever lies within
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] The door, and whatever lies within.             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 03, 2013 1:00 am I can't believe I'm only posting about this now, when it was news more than a year ago. Does anybody remember the second glimpse of 3.0 that we ever saw? Not the preview, mind you. In 2011, we were treated to a 19-second sneak peek of 3.0. Of course, none of this footage made it into the movie, save the last shot in the trailer. Except that wasn't the last shot. It was pretty difficult to catch, and I didn't even notice until my computer glitched out, pausing the video. (Note: The one that I posted clearly shows the image that I'm talking about.) My screen froze, and I was treated to this. The spoiler tags are only there to mark the image. There's no actual Q spoiler. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Sun Feb 03, 2013 1:14 am Well the most obvious thought that comes to my mind is that it's not Eva at all. This is what you found on Youtube, right? Could be as simple as the creator of the video catching the start of the next clip after the end of the Eva one. Kinda accounts for the short blank in between.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 03, 2013 1:30 am Lance of LoL wrote: Well the most obvious thought that comes to my mind is that it's not Eva at all. This is what you found on Youtube, right? Could be as simple as the creator of the video catching the start of the next clip after the end of the Eva one. Kinda accounts for the short blank in between.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Sun Feb 03, 2013 1:42 am In that case, what little I can see beyond the door appears to be grey, perhaps a landscape? It could be a prototype of the scene where Shinji sees the ruin after 3I? As a matter of thought, and this is pure speculation mind. Shinji received a piece of clothing from an old friend. What if in this draft it was Misato's old coat and this is him wearing it as he steps out onto the ruined landscape of Tokyo-3? After all, the buildings were destroyed, but there's no guarantee there isn't enough standing to allow for a scene/transition like this. All that would need to be standing is a door, a frame and one wall. Again, all purely speculative, but seeing nothing like this in the movie itself to my knowledge, I'm grasping at straws without more data. I still think it could just be an editing flub, it's not unusual for many different sites to have the same source for video.

[]:             Quote Post by Mori-kun » Sun Feb 03, 2013 2:31 am It must be that all the people who recorded it happened to include that clip. I simply doesn't fit in Eva. When else has there been a cut beyond the title card in a trailer? And that animation's quality pales in comparison to the rest of the trailer. I'm not really convinced.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Feb 03, 2013 2:44 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: It appeared in every instance of the trailer that I viewed. Whatever it is, it looks like it was meant to be there.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Feb 03, 2013 3:48 am The style is so glaringly different from that of the NME that it has to be something else just from looking at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 03, 2013 11:39 am Very well, then. I'm sad that it doesn't leave us with a mystery to figure out, but...

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Feb 03, 2013 1:58 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 03, 2013 2:57 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: This is possibly the stupidest thread I've seen on this forum outisde of off-topic, so you can at least take solace in that.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Feb 03, 2013 3:02 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Feb 03, 2013 3:15 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: I was just joking around, it was supposed to be in good fun. You could laugh along instead y'know

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Feb 03, 2013 3:17 pm And there I thought this would be about the door of gauf and how creepy it is that you actually see something on the other side, something like a solar eclipse.

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Sun Feb 03, 2013 3:36 pm Looks like Lupin III to me. Red Jacket series. Hairy hands are kinda distinctive.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Feb 03, 2013 4:25 pm Clearly there would have been a flashback where Lupin worked with Kaji to steal The Key of Nebuchadnezzar in an earlier draft of 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Feb 03, 2013 8:46 pm Kendrix wrote: And there I thought this would be about the door of gauf and how creepy it is that you actually see something on the other side, something like a solar eclipse.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Feb 04, 2013 12:24 am Darkwing wrote: We all know Anno is on the other side of that door. Shinji is going to meet him, and things will get incredibly meta.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Feb 04, 2013 7:55 am Darkwing wrote: We all know Anno is on the other side of that door. Shinji is going to meet him, and things will get incredibly meta.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 04, 2013 10:28 am CJD wrote: "So you're the one responsible for all my suffering?" "No, you see, it's you who are responsible. Your suffering is merely in your head, you have to change your perspective and rethi-" "No, no, you write me. You're responsible for my suffering. When bad things happen it's because you wrote it." "Well... yes." All they could recover of Anno was his left hand and a few strands of hair.

[]:             Quote Post by one-eyed » Tue Feb 05, 2013 10:14 am Sorry to intrude, should have nothing to do, but you reminded me Puchi Eva: Evangelion @ School - Chapter 20 (with Shinji in the desert) has a scene involving a strange door. And if you have time, check Puchi Eva - Evangelion @ School Cap 14, I think there's a symbolism that you may find interesting.
